projects[0].description: Orchestrated end-to-end website development lifecycle for client projects, from requirements clarification with stakeholders to deployment. Leveraged JavaScript, CSS (SCSS/Sass), HTML, WordPress and PHP to deliver marketing and corporate websites.
projects[0].title: Rerise

projects[1].description: Contributed to a new payment method implementation and other features using JavaScript, jQuery and HTML. Spearheaded requirements analysis and implementation, guaranteed on-time delivery of critical features. Strengthened JavaScript skills through intensive hands‑on work and self‑driven learning.
projects[1].title: Chitai Gorod

projects[2].description: Developed an internal admin panel for a major Russian bank using React and TypeScript, supported 500+ internal users daily. Contributed to a mobile investment application for one of Russia’s largest banks with 10K+ active users. Implemented extensive unit, integration and e2e tests (85%+ coverage) using Jest and React Testing Library.
projects[2].title: Globus-IT

projects[3].description: Led a team of 5 engineers on an international project for a Fortune 300 client, deployed a modern UI component library and large‑scale dependency modernization. Optimized an enterprise web application, reducing initial load time from 10 to 2 seconds through lazy loading, table data virtualization and render optimizations. Designed and implemented improvements to payment flows for a major global e‑commerce brand, supporting 1M+ daily transactions and improving reliability and user experience.
projects[3].title: Grid Dynamics

projects[4].description: Architected and engineered cryptocurrency platform using React, Remix, TypeScript and Node.js, specialized in security, performance and processing real-time transactions with 99.9% uptime target. Designed and implemented a migration from a monolithic frontend to a BFF + micro‑frontend architecture, improving system scalability by 200% and reducing deployment time by 20%. Coordinated product managers and backend engineers in an Agile environment (Jira, Confluence) to refine requirements and ship features to production.
projects[4].title: T1 Innotech

personal.position: Senior Frontend / Full-Stack Engineer / Team Lead

profile.bio: Senior Frontend Engineer with 7+ years building high-scale web applications for international companies. Reduced load times by 80%, improved system scalability by 200%, and supported 1M+ daily transactions. Expert in React, TypeScript, and micro-frontend architectures with strong background in fintech and e-commerce domains.
profile.title: Profile
